Range anxiety
triples.object: Range anxiety is the driver 's fear that a vehicle has insufficient energy storage (fuel and/or battery capacity) to cover the road distance needed to reach its intended destination, and would thus strand the vehicle's occupants mid-way. [ 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] The term, which as of 2010 was used pr

triples.subject: Combined Charging System
triples.object: The Combined Charging System ( CCS ) is a charging station standard for plug-in electric vehicles that uses the Combo 1 ( CCS1 ) or Combo 2 ( CCS2 ) connectors, which are extensions of the IEC 62196 Type 1 and Type 2 alternating current (AC) connectors, respectively, each with two additional direct

Electric vehicle battery
State of charge
triples.object: State of charge ( SoC ) quantifies the remaining capacity available in a battery at a given time and in relation to a given state of ageing. [ 1 ] It is usually expressed as percentage (0% = empty; 100% = full). An alternative form of the same measure is the depth of discharge (DoD), calculated as 1

triples.subject: Battery management system
triples.object: A battery management system ( BMS ) is any electronic system that manages a rechargeable battery ( cell or battery pack ) by facilitating the safe usage and a long life of the battery in practical scenarios while monitoring and estimating its various states (such as state of health and state of char

triples.subject: Thermal runaway
triples.object: Thermal runaway describes a process that is accelerated by increased temperature , in turn releasing energy that further increases temperature. Thermal runaway occurs in situations where an increase in temperature changes the conditions in a way that causes a further increase in temperature, often l

triples.subject: Plug-in hybrid
triples.object: A plug-in hybrid electric vehicle ( PHEV ) or simply plug-in hybrid is a type of hybrid electric vehicle equipped with a rechargeable battery pack that can be directly replenished via a charging cable plugged into an external electric power source, in addition to charging internally by its on-board

triples.subject: Electric motor
triples.object: An electric motor is a machine that converts electrical energy into mechanical energy . Most electric motors operate through the interaction between the motor's magnetic field and electric current in a wire winding to generate Laplace force in the form of torque applied on the motor's shaft. An elec

Dashcam
triples.object: A dashboard camera or simply dashcam , also known as car digital video recorder ( car DVR ), driving recorder , or event data recorder ( EDR ), is an onboard camera that continuously records the view through a vehicle's front windscreen and sometimes rear or other windows. Some dashcams include a ca

triples.subject: Inverter
triples.object: A power inverter , inverter , or invertor is a power electronic device or circuitry that changes direct current (DC) to alternating current (AC). [ 1 ] The resulting AC frequency obtained depends on the particular device employed. Inverters do the opposite of rectifiers which were originally large e
